---
title: "verify_router.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/scripts/verify_router.ts"
loc: 42
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.25
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 5.21
overall_score: 5.43
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 1 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [CognitiveRouter](file://../src/node/core/CognitiveRouter.js)
- [CorvusProcess](file://../src/node/core/CorvusProcess.js)
- [EventManager](file://../src/node/core/EventManager.js)

### Exports
- `verifyRouter`
- `router`
- `corvus`
- `eventManager`
- `edgePayload`
- `corePayload`
